_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: REAL Property Facilities AS-BUILT Drawings
summary: This Data Item Description provides requirements for Real Property Facilities As-Built Drawings, which are essential for permanent facility records, operation, maintenance, modification, and planning.
use_relationship: Real Property Facilities As-Built Drawings are the construction drawings modified and annotated to reflect the actual completed construction effort. They are used as part of the permanent real property facility record for operation, maintenance, modification, space utilization, and planning activities related to the facility. a. This Data Item Description (DID) can be applied in any program phase where the acquisition requires facility construction, alteration, or modification. b. This DID contains the format, content, and intended use information for the data deliverable resulting from the work task described in the contract. c. This DID supersedes DI-MISC-81489A.

references.label: Copies of this document are available online at

distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference documents.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions, shall be as specified in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: The Real Property Facilities As-Built Drawings shall be in accordance with ethical professional engineering principles and standard drafting practices, and shall be in the following formats:

children.title: Electronic Computer-Aided Design (CAD) Files.
children.content: The electronic form of Real Property Facilities As-Built Drawings shall be based on the most current version of the U.S National CAD Standard (NCS) at construction turnover. (Copies of this document are available online at www.nationalcadstandard.org.) Dissimilar items of information shall not be contained in the same file (for example, Mechanical and Electrical Plans). Electronic CAD files shall include digital representations of all drawings that are submitted, as well as any supporting files, such as cell and block libraries, plotting set-up files, user menus, and similar graphic files.

children.title: Full-scale, non-reproducible hard-copies.
children.content: The Full-scale, non-reproducible hard-copies of Real Property Facilities As-Built Drawings shall be clear, legible, and in accordance with commercial industry standards.

children.title: Reduced-size, non-reproducible hard-copies.
children.content: The Reduced-size, non-reproducible hard-copies of Real Property Facilities As-Built Drawings shall be clear, legible, and in accordance with commercial industry standards. The Reduced-size copies of drawings shall be clearly marked to indicate that they are printed at a reduced size (for example, "D/B": where "D" denotes the original size and "B" denotes the reduced size).

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: The Real Property Facilities As-Built Drawings shall accurately reflect the condition of all real property facilities, as constructed, installed, and erected. This shall include any differing site conditions, to include underground or hidden utilities or obstructions that remained, and all modifications and alterations made to the original contract drawings during the course of construction and installation.

children.title: When changes from the original construction contract documents are not extensive, reproducible construction contract drawings may be revised to show as-built conditions.

The title "As-Built" shall be clearly marked on the As-Built Drawings, above the title block, and the words, "Final Revision" shall be inserted in the title block, together with the date the As-Built Drawings were added to the record documents.
